idea-plugin.name: Sefin One Dark Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A polished One Dark-inspired theme for JetBrains IDEs, refined and maintained as an independent project.

The theme preserves the familiar One Dark feel with careful maintenance, clean packaging, and Sefin-branded variants. It was designed for calm work during long coding sessions and to look especially good on OLED and QD-OLED displays.

Available themes:

  • Sefin One Dark
  • Sefin One Dark Vivid
  • Sefin One Dark Islands
  • Sefin One Dark Vivid Islands

After installation, select the theme in Settings | Appearance & Behavior | Appearance.
For Islands variants, enable Settings | Advanced Settings | Enable Islands UI for custom themes.
